items.title_en: I traced $2B in grants and 45 states' lobbying behind age‑verification bills
items.title_zh: 追踪到20亿美元资助与45州游说推动年龄验证法案
items.summary_en: An analysis traces who funds age-verification legislation, tallying about $2 billion in nonprofit grants and lobbying across 45 states. The findings illustrate how goal-aligned funding and political pressure shape digital-safety policy, privacy protections, and access to online content.
items.summary_zh: 调查揭示约20亿美元的非营利资助和45个州的游说推动年龄验证相关立法，显示资金流向直接影响数字安全与隐私政策的走向。结果强调政策制定往往被资助网络和政治压力所塑形。

items.title_en: Nanny state discovers Linux, demands it check kids' IDs before booting
items.title_zh: ‘ nanny state ’ 发现 Linux，要求在引导阶段核验用户身份
items.summary_en: An opinion piece argues that a 'nanny state' approach could push Linux to enforce boot-time identity checks. It raises concerns about privacy, security, and user freedom as operating systems increasingly gate access.
items.summary_zh: 这篇观点文章质疑在操作系统层面强制启动时身份核验的做法，称之为‘ nanny state’式干预。文章讨论了此举对隐私、安全与用户自由的潜在影响。

items.title_en: TUI Studio – visual terminal UI design tool
items.title_zh: TUI Studio：可视化终端 UI 设计工具
items.summary_en: Visual terminal UI design tool enabling rapid prototyping of terminal interfaces with drag-and-drop components and live previews. It lowers the barrier to building polished CLI dashboards and tools, signaling a maturing ecosystem for text-based UIs.
items.summary_zh: 一个可视化的终端 UI 设计工具，支持拖拽组件与实时预览，帮助快速原型化终端界面。该工具降低了构建精美 CLI 控制台的门槛，体现了文本界面工具生态的成熟。

items.title_en: E2E encrypted messaging on Instagram will no longer be supported after 8 May
items.title_zh: Instagram 将在 5 月 8 日后不再支持端对端加密消息
items.summary_en: This change ends the E2E encryption for Instagram messaging, reducing privacy guarantees and potentially exposing metadata to the platform. The move underscores trade-offs between privacy, moderation, and data access.
items.summary_zh: Instagram 将于 5 月 8 日后不再支持端对端加密的消息传递，降低隐私保护。此举可能让元数据暴露在平台可观察之下，对用户安全产生影响。

items.title_en: Shall I implement it? No
items.title_zh: 要不要自己实现？不
items.summary_en: Sometimes the best move is to resist building something from scratch and instead reuse or skip it altogether.
items.summary_zh: 有时最明智的做法不是从零实现某个功能，而是优先复用现成方案或直接放弃该实现。

items.title_en: Qatar helium shutdown puts chip supply chain on a two-week clock
items.title_zh: 卡塔尔氦气停产将芯片供应链推向两周窗口
items.summary_en: Qatar's helium shutdown creates a two-week bottleneck for chip manufacturing, highlighting how a single commodity can ripple through global supply chains. The disruption urges buyers to diversify inputs and lines.
items.summary_zh: 这一事件凸显了稀缺资源在半导体生产中的关键性，以及全球供应链对单一材料的脆弱性。未来企业需要寻求替代品或多元化采购来缓解风险。

items.title_en: Run NanoClaw in Docker Sandboxes
items.title_zh: 在 Docker 沙箱中运行 NanoClaw
items.summary_en: NanoClaw can be executed inside Docker sandbox environments, enabling safer analysis of potentially malicious code. Running in isolated containers helps researchers study behavior without compromising host systems.
items.summary_zh: NanoClaw 现在可在 Docker 沙箱中运行，实现对潜在恶意代码的更安全分析。在隔离的容器中执行可降低对主机系统的风险，便于研究者观察其行为。

items.title_en: “This is not the computer for you”
items.title_zh: 这不是适合你的那台电脑
items.summary_en: This piece argues that a given computer isn't the right tool for everyone, challenging the idea that one device fits all needs.
items.summary_zh: 本文质疑某台电脑并非适合所有人，挑战“一个设备适合所有需求”的观点。

items.title_en: Vite 8.0 Is Out
items.title_zh: Vite 8.0 发布
items.summary_en: Vite 8.0 marks a major upgrade with performance and DX improvements for modern frontend workflows. The release introduces new features and upgrades that impact build speed, dev server behavior, and plugin ecosystem; developers should review the upgrade guide and plan compatibility checks.
items.summary_zh: Vite 8.0 带来现代前端工作流的重大升级，提升构建速度和开发体验。新特性和改进影响构建、开发服务器行为及插件生态，开发者应查看升级指南并规划兼容性检查。

items.title_en: Bucketsquatting is (finally) dead
items.title_zh: Bucketsquatting 终于消亡
items.summary_en: Bucket squatting, a common cloud misconfiguration attack, is finally on the decline as providers improve bucket naming controls and domain verification. The development highlights how cloud security tooling evolves to close opportunistic attack vectors.
items.summary_zh: Bucketsquatting 是指滥用云存储桶的所有权抢占行为，近期逐步减少，云厂商加强了桶命名控制与域验证。此举凸显云端安全工具在封堵利用路径方面的进展。

items.title_en: Source code of Swedish e-government services has been leaked
items.title_zh: 瑞典电子政务源代码被泄露
items.summary_en: Source code of Sweden's e-government services leaked from compromised infrastructure, raising security and policy concerns. The incident underscores the importance of supply-chain and access controls for public sector software.
items.summary_zh: 瑞典电子政务服务的源代码在被入侵的基础设施中泄露，引发安全与合规方面的担忧。

items.title_en: Malus – Clean Room as a Service
items.title_zh: Malus：洁净室即服务
items.summary_en: Malus offers a ‘clean room as a service’ model to support IP-conscious software development without exposing sensitive assets. The approach aims to balance collaboration with IP protection, appealing to teams needing controlled environments for sensitive work.
items.summary_zh: Malus 提供“洁净室即服务”的模式，帮助团队在不暴露敏感资产的前提下进行合规的软件开发。该方法力图在协作与知识产权保护之间取得平衡，适用于需要受控开发环境的场景。

items.title_en: Innocent woman jailed after being misidentified using AI facial recognition
items.title_zh: 因AI人脸识别误识而入狱的无辜老妇人
items.summary_en: An innocent grandmother spent months in jail after facial recognition wrongly identified her as a fraud suspect. The case underscores the high-stakes risk of relying on imperfect AI for law enforcement, where false positives can ruin lives and erode trust. It adds to ongoing debates about accuracy, bias, and accountability in AI-powered policing.
items.summary_zh: 一位无辜的老妇人在人脸识别错误识别后被关押数月。此案凸显在执法中依赖不完美的人工智能所带来的高风险——误判可能摧毁个人生活并侵蚀公众信任。事件推动有关准确性、偏见与对AI警务的问责制度的讨论。

items.title_en: Prompt-caching – auto-injects Anthropic cache breakpoints (90% token savings)
items.title_zh: Prompt-caching：自动注入 Anthropic 缓存断点（节省约 90% 的 token）
items.summary_en: Prompt-caching automatically injects cache breakpoints to save around 90% of tokens in prompts. This approach can significantly reduce cost and latency for large-scale LLM workloads.
items.summary_zh: 该方法通过自动注入缓存断点，显著减少提示中的 token 量，约降低 90% 的令牌消耗。

items.title_en: Show HN: Algorithms and Data Structures in TypeScript – Free Book (~400 Pages)
items.title_zh: Show HN：用 TypeScript 编写的算法与数据结构——免费电子书（约400页）
items.summary_en: A free, ~400-page resource showcases classic algorithms and data structures implemented in TypeScript. It provides TS-ready explanations and runnable code examples, making it useful for practicing interview prep and TS-centric education.
items.summary_zh: 这本约400页的免费书籍用 TypeScript 给出经典的算法与数据结构实现。内容配有可直接运行的 TS 代码示例，适合进行面试准备和 TS 学习。

items.title_en: Launch HN: Spine Swarm (YC S23) – AI agents that collaborate on a visual canvas
items.title_zh: Launch HN：Spine Swarm（YC S23）— 在可视画布上协作的 AI 代理
items.summary_en: Spine Swarm brings together multiple AI agents that coordinate on a single visual canvas to tackle complex tasks. By enabling agents to co-edit a shared space, it could unlock new multi-agent collaboration patterns for design, planning, and problem solving.
items.summary_zh: Spine Swarm 将多个人工智能代理聚合在一个可视化画布上协同工作以完成复杂任务。通过让代理在同一个共享空间中共同编辑，它可能开启设计、计划与问题解决等多智能体协作的新模式。

items.title_en: ATMs didn’t kill bank teller jobs, but the iPhone did
items.title_zh: ATM 没杀死出纳员工作，但 iPhone 做到了
items.summary_en: A look at how mobile banking and smartphones reshaped consumer behavior and staffing beyond ATM adoption. The broader automation shift continues to redefine frontline roles and service models.
items.summary_zh: 探讨移动银行和智能手机如何重塑消费行为与人员配置，超越单纯的 ATM 使用。更广泛的自动化转型正在重新定义前线岗位和服务模式。

items.title_en: Ceno, browse the web without internet access
items.title_zh: Ceno：离线浏览网页
items.summary_en: Ceno lets users browse the web offline or with limited connectivity by caching pages and assets. This enables continued access during outages or bandwidth-constrained environments.
items.summary_zh: Ceno 让用户在离线状态下浏览网页，通过缓存页面和资源实现离线访问。适用于网络不稳定环境或数据限制的场景。

items.title_en: Bubble Sorted Amen Break
items.title_zh: 冒泡排序版 Amen Break
items.summary_en: A playful audio project applies bubble-sort to the Amen Break, producing evolving, glitchy variants as elements swap positions. It’s a creative fusion of algorithmic thinking and music that invites exploration of generative sound.
items.summary_zh: 这是一个将冒泡排序应用到 Amen Break 的创意音频项目，随着元素逐步交换，音轨不断演变，产生 glitch 风格的变体。它将算法思维与音乐相结合，值得探索其生成音效的过程。

items.title_en: Enhancing gut-brain communication reversed cognitive decline in aging mice
items.title_zh: 增强肠‑脑沟通可逆转老龄小鼠认知衰退
items.summary_en: Researchers enhanced gut-brain signaling in aging mice and observed reversal of cognitive decline, suggesting a gut-brain axis target for aging-related cognitive disorders. While promising, translating to humans will require careful trials and understanding of long-term effects.
items.summary_zh: 研究显示通过强化肠-脑信号，老化小鼠的认知衰退得到逆转，提示将来或可通过调节肠道信号治疗与年龄相关的认知疾病。尽管前景乐观，人类转化仍需大量临床试验并慎重评估长期影响。

items.title_en: Retailer denies memory replacement due to 4x increase in DDR5 pricing
items.title_zh: 零售商否认因 DDR5 价格上涨而更换记忆体
items.summary_en: A retailer refused to replace faulty memory after a DDR5 price spike, arguing the price increase would be a customer upgrade. The situation highlights how pricing volatility can affect warranties.
items.summary_zh: 在 DDR5 价格上涨四倍的背景下，零售商拒绝更换故障内存，辩称价格上涨会促成对客户的升级。

items.title_en: US private credit defaults hit record 9.2% in 2025, Fitch says
items.title_zh: 据称2025年美国私募信贷违约率创纪录达到9.2%
items.summary_en: Fitch reports private-credit defaults reached 9.2% in 2025, signaling stress in leveraged loan markets and potential spillovers to banks via exposures. The data underscores risk in non-bank lending sectors and the need for prudent risk management.
items.summary_zh: 费奇称2025年美国私募信贷违约率达到9.2%，显示杠杆贷款市场承压，且敞口可能对银行产生传导效应。该数据凸显非银行放贷领域的风险，并强调审慎的风险管理需求。

items.title_en: AI toys for children misread emotions and respond inappropriately
items.title_zh: AI 教具对儿童的情感理解失准、反应不当
items.summary_en: AI toys for children misread emotions and respond inappropriately, raising safety and developmental concerns. Regulators and developers will need better guardrails and transparent design practices.
items.summary_zh: 面向儿童的 AI 玩具在情感识别上存在误读并作出不当反应，引发隐私、安全与儿童发展方面的担忧。此类误判可能影响儿童互动体验并暴露数据隐私风险，促使家长与监管机构关注设计与合规性。

items.title_en: An old photo of a large BBS (2022)
items.title_zh: 2022年的一张大型 BBS 的旧照片
items.summary_en: A 2022-era look at a large BBS reveals the scale and culture of early online communities, with a photo capturing thousands of users and the nostalgia of bulletin-board-era communities. The post reflects on how distributed, community-driven forums evolved into modern social networks.
items.summary_zh: 回顾 2022 年的一张大型 BBS 的照片，揭示了早期在线社区的规模与文化，以及数千用户共同参与的场景。博文也让人怀念早期以社区为导向的论坛如何逐渐演变成如今的社交网络。

items.title_en: Grief and the AI split
items.title_zh: AI 的悲痛与分裂
items.summary_en: Lorchard's piece argues that the AI shift triggers a sense of grief as people reconcile with reduced agency and changing work cultures. It advocates thoughtful design, policy, and governance to ensure AI augments rather than erodes human purposes.
items.summary_zh: 作者在探讨人工智能兴起带来的情感困境，认为人们在适应新工作模式的同时会经历‘失去掌控感’的悲痛。文章呼吁在设计、政策和治理层面保持以人为本，确保 AI 只是提升人类能力而非取代。

items.title_en: The Met releases high-def 3D scans of 140 famous art objects
items.title_zh: 大都会博物馆发布140件著名艺术品的高精度3D扫描
items.summary_en: The Met releases high-definition 3D scans of 140 masterpieces, enabling researchers and the public to explore works in interactive detail. This move could expand art education, provenance research, and digital preservation opportunities.
items.summary_zh: 大都会博物馆公开了140件杰作的高分辨率3D扫描，供研究者和公众以互动方式深入欣赏。此举有望扩大艺术教育、留存性研究和数字化保存的机会。

items.title_en: Big data on the cheapest MacBook
items.title_zh: 在最便宜的MacBook上进行大数据处理
items.summary_en: DuckDB demonstrates running analytics workloads on a budget MacBook, showing how consumer hardware can handle practical data tasks with local processing. While feasible for light-to-moderate datasets, RAM and storage limits still bound scale.
items.summary_zh: DuckDB 展示了在经济型 MacBook 上运行分析工作负载，展示了消费级硬件在本地处理数据的可行性。对于轻至中等数据量虽可实现，但受限于RAM与存储，规模化仍有约束。

items.title_en: Gvisor on Raspbian
items.title_zh: 在 Raspbian 上运行 gVisor
items.summary_en: Running gVisor on Raspbian enables container sandboxing on Raspberry Pi devices. This brings stronger isolation for edge deployments and hobbyist projects alike.
items.summary_zh: 在 Raspbian 上部署 gVisor，可以为树莓派设备提供容器沙箱功能。

items.title_en: Kotlin creator's new language: talk to LLMs in specs, not English
items.title_zh: Codespeak.dev：用规范而非英语与 LLM 对话的新语言
items.summary_en: Codespeak.dev proposes talking to LLMs in specs rather than plain English, a spec-first approach to prompts that could improve precision and safety. The project hints at tooling that compiles user constraints into machine-readable prompts, enabling better reproducibility.
items.summary_zh: Codespeak.dev 提议用规范（而非普通英语）与大模型对话，一种以规范为先的提示方式，可能提升精准度与安全性。该项目暗示将用户约束编译为机器可读的提示，以提高可重复性。

items.title_en: Italian prosecutors seek trial for Amazon, 4 execs in alleged $1.4B tax evasion
items.title_zh: 意大利检方就亚马逊及4名高管涉14亿美元逃税提起审判
items.summary_en: Italian prosecutors pursue a trial against Amazon and four executives over alleged multi-billion euro tax evasion, highlighting ongoing EU scrutiny of tech giants and tax strategy.
items.summary_zh: 意大利检方就亚马逊及4名高管涉多亿欧元逃税提起审判，凸显欧盟对科技巨头及税务策略的持续审查。

items.title_en: Vite+ Alpha: Unified Toolchain for the Web (MIT License)
items.title_zh: Vite+ Alpha：Web 的统一工具链（MIT 许可证）
items.summary_en: Vite+ Alpha introduces a unified web toolchain for modern development, aiming to streamline build, dev server, and tooling with an MIT-licensed ecosystem.
items.summary_zh: Vite+ Alpha 作为一个面向现代 Web 的统一工具链，旨在简化构建、开发服务器及相关工具，采用 MIT 许可证。

items.title_en: Dolphin Progress Release 2603
items.title_zh: Dolphin 进展发布 2603
items.summary_en: Dolphin Emulator’s 2603 progress release brings fixes and performance tweaks across Wii and GameCube emulation. Expect improved accuracy, better input handling, and shader-related stability on various hosts, underscoring continued community-led refinement.
items.summary_zh: Dolphin Emulator 的2603进展发布带来Wii/ GameCube 模拟的修复与性能优化。预计在输入处理、着色器稳定性等方面提升，并提升在不同主机上的兼容性，体现社区持续改进的精神。

items.title_en: Claude now creates interactive charts, diagrams and visualizations
items.title_zh: Claude 现在能创建交互式图表、图解和可视化
items.summary_en: Claude can generate live visuals such as charts and diagrams, expanding its utility beyond text to aid data storytelling and analysis.
items.summary_zh: Claude 现在可以生成互动图表、图解和可视化，拓展了其在数据讲述与分析中的应用。

items.title_en: Bringing Chrome to ARM64 Linux Devices
items.title_zh: 把 Chrome 带到 ARM64 Linux 设备
items.summary_en: Google's Chrome is now being built for ARM64 Linux devices, expanding access to a Chrome experience on ARM laptops and SBCs. The port signals ongoing cross-architecture support and may affect developer workflows on ARM-based distributions, potentially improving performance and power efficiency with native builds.
items.summary_zh: Google 正在为 ARM64 Linux 设备构建 Chrome，扩大在 ARM 笔记本和单板计算机上的浏览器体验。该移植显示出对跨架构支持的持续努力，可能提升在 ARM 发行版上的开发者工作流，并通过原生构建带来性能与功耗的潜在提升。

items.title_en: Show HN: Axe – A 12MB binary that replaces your AI framework
items.title_zh: Show HN：Axe A 12MB 二进制可替代AI框架
items.summary_en: A 12MB binary claims to replace a full AI framework, illustrating a push toward ultra-compact, self-contained AI components. While intriguing, real-world performance, tooling support, and ecosystem compatibility remain critical questions.
items.summary_zh: 一个12MB的二进制声称可替代完整的AI框架，体现了向极简、独立AI组件演进的趋势。尽管吸引眼球，实际性能、工具链与生态兼容性仍是关键考量。

items.title_en: Runners who churn butter on their runs
items.title_zh: 在跑步中搅拌黄油的跑者
items.summary_en: Runners who churn butter on their runs demonstrate a quirky real-food fueling approach. The piece weighs practicality, energy considerations, and the potential mess and discomfort of trying to dine on dairy fat mid-workout.
items.summary_zh: 边跑步边搅拌黄油的跑者展示了一种另类的实用营养补充方式。文章评估了可行性、能量供给以及在跑步中摄取奶脂的实际挑战。

items.title_en: Show HN: OneCLI – Vault for AI Agents in Rust
items.title_zh: Show HN: OneCLI — 用 Rust 实现的 AI 代理密钥库
items.summary_en: OneCLI presents a Vault-like CLI for AI agents built in Rust, focusing on secure secret management and shareable credentials across tasks. It aims to simplify reproducible AI workflows and bolster security in automation.
items.summary_zh: OneCLI 提供一个用 Rust 实现、类似 Vault 的 AI 代理密钥管理 CLI，侧重安全地管理秘密并在任务间共享凭证。目标是简化可重复的 AI 工作流并提升自动化安全性。

items.title_en: 3D-Knitting: The Ultimate Guide
items.title_zh: 3D针织：终极指南
items.summary_en: 3D knitting blends digital design with fabric fabrication; this guide covers materials, machines, and end-to-end workflows from design to knit. It highlights how additive textile manufacturing enables rapid prototyping and customized textiles.
items.summary_zh: 3D 针织将数字设计与织物制造结合起来；本指南介绍材料、设备与从设计到成品的全流程。它强调数字化纺织在快速原型和定制化织物中的应用潜力。

items.title_en: Avoiding Trigonometry (2013)
items.title_zh: 避免三角函数（2013）
items.summary_en: Iñigo Quilez shows how many trig-based results can be computed without actual trig calls, using algebraic identities and approximations. The techniques matter for shader writers seeking higher performance without sacrificing visual fidelity.
items.summary_zh: Iñigo Quilez 展示了许多涉及三角函数的结果可以不用实际三角函数调用来计算，借助代数恒等和近似。对于追求高性能着色器并保持视觉效果的开发者尤为重要。

items.title_en: WolfIP: Lightweight TCP/IP stack with no dynamic memory allocations
items.title_zh: WolfIP：无动态内存分配的轻量级 TCP/IP 栈
items.summary_en: WolfIP is a compact TCP/IP stack designed for constrained environments, avoiding dynamic memory to improve predictability and safety in embedded systems.
items.summary_zh: WolfIP 是一个面向资源受限环境的轻量级 TCP/IP 栈，避免动态内存分配，以提升嵌入式系统的可预测性和安全性。

items.title_en: Executing programs inside transformers with exponentially faster inference
items.title_zh: 在变换器中执行程序，推理速度指数级提升
items.summary_en: New work shows how executing programs inside transformer architectures can yield exponential gains in inference speed. This blurs the line between computation and prompting, with implications for AI acceleration and edge deployment.
items.summary_zh: 研究称在变换器架构内部执行程序，可以带来推理速度的指数级提升。这一思路模糊了计算与提示的界线，对 AI 加速和边缘部署具有重要影响。

items.title_en: Iran-backed hackers claim wiper attack on medtech firm Stryker
items.title_zh: 伊朗支持的黑客声称对医疗技术公司 Stryker 发动抹除式攻击
items.summary_en: Iran-linked hackers claim a wiper-style intrusion against medical device maker Stryker, signaling potentially disruptive cyber-attacks against healthcare tech. The report underscores the need for resilient backups, segmentation, and incident response to mitigate wipe-based intrusions in critical supply chains.
items.summary_zh: 据称伊朗支持的黑客对医疗设备厂商 Stryker 发动抹除式攻击，可能影响医疗领域的网络安全态势。此事凸显对医疗科技供应链的潜在风险，强调加强备份、网络分段和事件响应的重要性。

items.title_en: Long overlooked as crucial to life, fungi start to get their due
items.title_zh: 长期被忽视的生命关键——真菌开始获得关注
items.summary_en: A feature highlighting fungi’s critical roles in ecosystems, medicine, and industry, arguing for more research and recognition of their significance to life on Earth.
items.summary_zh: 聚焦真菌在生态系统、医学与工业中的关键作用，呼吁加大研究和对真菌重要性的认知。

items.title_en: Are LLM merge rates not getting better?
items.title_zh: LLM 的合并速率真的还在提高吗？
items.summary_en: Questioning whether LLM merge rate improvements are slowing, the piece critiques benchmark design and claims that apparent gains may be overstated without standardized, reproducible tests. It calls for clearer metrics and more rigorous evaluation.
items.summary_zh: 质疑在大型语言模型上的合并提升是否变慢，文章批评基准设计，声称若缺乏标准化、可重复的测试，表面上的收益可能被高估。呼吁采用更清晰的度量标准与更严格的评估。

items.title_en: Document poisoning in RAG systems: How attackers corrupt AI's sources
items.title_zh: RAG系统中的文档投毒：攻击者污染AI的来源
items.summary_en: Attackers can poison the documents used by retrieval-augmented generation systems, skewing the answers those systems produce. This stresses the need for provenance, vetted sources, and robust retrieval hygiene to defend AI from data-level manipulation. Practitioners should invest in data validation, monitoring, and multi-source corroboration.
items.summary_zh: 攻击者可污染RAG系统使用的检索文档，进而扭曲系统输出的答案。这凸显了数据来源可追溯性、源文筛选和检索卫生方面的必要性，以抵御数据级的操纵。开发者应加强数据验证、监控以及多源校验。

items.title_en: Show HN: Rudel – Claude Code Session Analytics
items.title_zh: Show HN: Rudel — Claude 代码会话分析工具
items.summary_en: Rudel analyzes Claude sessions to reveal code reasoning, efficiency, and potential biases. It helps teams understand how AI assists coding tasks and where improvements are needed.
items.summary_zh: Rudel 对 Claude 的对话会话进行分析，揭示代码推理、效率与潜在偏差。帮助团队评估 AI 辅助编码任务的效果与改进点。

items.title_en: Show HN: Understudy – Teach a desktop agent by demonstrating a task once
items.title_zh: Show HN: Understudy — 通过一次演示教会桌面自动化代理
items.summary_en: Understudy lets you demonstrate a task once and teach a desktop agent to repeat it across apps. This approach could dramatically accelerate building practical automation without scripting.
items.summary_zh: Understudy 允许通过一次演示来教会桌面代理在跨应用中重复执行任务。这种方法可能极大地加速无脚本的实际自动化构建。

items.title_en: Launch HN: IonRouter (YC W26) – High-throughput, low-cost inference
items.title_zh: Launch HN：IonRouter（YC W26）— 高吞吐、低成本推理
items.summary_en: IonRouter claims high-throughput, low-cost inference, targeting scalable ML workloads with efficient batching and deployment methods. The product promises affordable inference at scale for developers and startups, potentially competing with traditional GPUs and cloud inference services.
items.summary_zh: IonRouter 宣称在推理方面具有高吞吐、低成本，面向可扩展的 ML 工作负载，通过高效的批处理和部署特性实现。该产品有望让开发者和初创企业以低成本实现规模化推理，可能与传统的 GPU 和云推理服务竞争。

items.title_en: Hyperlinks in Terminal Emulators
items.title_zh: 终端模拟器中的超链接
items.summary_en: Terminal emulators can support clickable links via OSC 8, enabling direct navigation from CLI output. This capability improves developer workflows by making URLs and references actionable inside terminals. The note covers practical adoption, portability caveats, and user expectations.
items.summary_zh: 通过 OSC 8，终端模拟器可以实现可点击的链接，使 CLI 输出中的 URL 能直接跳转。此能力能提升开发工作流的效率与可用性，但在跨终端的可移植性与一致性方面也需注意。

items.title_en: The Road Not Taken: A World Where IPv4 Evolved
items.title_zh: 未走的路：IPv4 演化的另一种可能
items.summary_en: An exploration of alternate histories for IPv4’s evolution, offering lessons for network design, routing, and potential future internet architectures.
items.summary_zh: 探讨 IPv4 漏轨演化的另一种历史路径，为网络设计、路由选择及未来互联网架构提供启示。

items.title_en: Can you instruct a robot to make a PBJ sandwich?
items.title_zh: 你能指示机器人做花生酱三明治吗？
items.summary_en: Deliberate's experiment uses a simple sandwich task to probe how well current robotics and natural-language interfaces translate human intent into action. It exposes the gaps between abstract instructions and reliable robotic execution, along with implications for instruction tuning and safety.
items.summary_zh: 通过一个做花生酱三明治的示例任务，探究现有机器人与自然语言接口将人类意图转化为行动的能力。揭示从抽象指令到可靠执行之间的差距，并对指令调整与安全性提出思考。

items.title_en: Lost Doctor Who Episodes Found
items.title_zh: 失落的《神秘博士》剧集被发现
items.summary_en: Previously missing Doctor Who episodes have been discovered, filling gaps in early TV history. The find has implications for archiving, media preservation, and fan culture around the long-running series.
items.summary_zh: 此前缺失的《神秘博士》剧集现已找回，弥补了早期电视史的空白。这一发现对档案保存、媒体保留与长期粉丝文化具有重要意义。

items.title_en: Willingness to look stupid
items.title_zh: 敢于出丑的勇气
items.summary_en: Embracing the possibility of looking stupid accelerates learning and innovation. It encourages rapid experimentation, honest feedback, and psychological safety in teams. The piece argues that the payoff from taking small risks often outweighs the embarrassment of initial missteps.
items.summary_zh: 敢于出丑的勇气可以加速学习和创新。它促使团队进行快速试错、直率反馈，并提升心理安全感。作者认为从小型风险中获得的收益往往超过初次失误带来的尴尬。

items.title_en: Does Where You're Born Matter More Than How Hard You Work?
items.title_zh: 出生地比努力更重要吗？
items.summary_en: Reviews research on whether birthplace and location factors explain more of outcomes than individual effort, with implications for policy and equity.
items.summary_zh: 回顾关于出生地/地域因素是否比个人努力更能决定成就的研究，提出对政策和公平性的启示。

items.title_en: Celebrating Interesting Flickr Technologies
items.title_zh: 庆祝 Flickr 的有趣技术
items.summary_en: Explores the engineering choices behind Flickr’s early success at scale, highlighting inventive storage, indexing, and delivery approaches. The piece distills practical lessons for building resilient, media-heavy web services.
items.summary_zh: 回顾 Flickr 在大规模图片服务背后的工程选择，突出在存储、索引和分发方面的创新做法。文章提炼出构建高健壮性、面向媒体的网络服务的实用经验。

items.title_en: Daily multivitamin use may slow biological aging: COSMOS trial results
items.title_zh: 每日多维生素可能减缓生物衰老COSMOS试验结果
items.summary_en: COSMOS trial suggests daily multivitamin use may modestly slow aging biomarkers, but results are preliminary and long-term data are needed. The finding sparks discussion about supplements in aging research and public health guidance.
items.summary_zh: COSMOS 试验表明每日服用多种维生素可能在衰老生物标志方面带来温和的减缓效果，但证据尚属初步，需长期数据确认。此发现引发关于补充剂在衰老研究与公共健康建议中的讨论。

items.title_en: I Hacked My Laundry Card. Here's What I Learned
items.title_zh: 我破解了我的洗衣卡，我学到了什么
items.summary_en: Describes reverse-engineering a laundromat card to understand its system, revealing security weaknesses and the importance of tamper resistance. The piece offers practical takeaways for hardware wallets, reader devices, and responsible tinkering.
items.summary_zh: 讲述对洗衣卡系统进行逆向工程的过程，揭示安全薄弱点与抗篡改设计的重要性。文章为相关硬件设备的开发提供可贵经验，强调对硬件系统进行改造时的安全性与伦理责任。

items.title_en: Show HN: Global Maritime Chokepoints
items.title_zh: Show HN：全球海上瓶颈点
items.summary_en: Show HN presents a dataset and visualizations of major maritime chokepoints, useful for understanding supply chain risk and geography. It highlights how disruptions at these points propagate through global trade and what open data can empower in logistics planning.
items.summary_zh: Show HN 展示了全球海上瓶颈点的数据集及交互可视化，有助于理解供应链风险与地理要点。它强调这些关键路线的中断如何波及全球贸易，以及开放数据在物流规划中的潜在价值。

items.summary_en: A newly released photograph titled IMG_0416 (2024) highlighting the photographer's current work.
items.summary_zh: 标注为 IMG_0416（2024）的新照片，展示摄影师当前的作品。

items.title_en: Understanding the Go Runtime: The Scheduler
items.title_zh: 理解 Go 运行时：调度器
items.summary_en: The Go runtime scheduler coordinates goroutine execution across OS threads, using work-stealing and preemption to keep Go programs responsive. It affects latency, throughput, and how you should tune GOMAXPROCS and blocking calls.
items.summary_zh: Go 运行时的调度器在操作系统线程之间协调 goroutine 的执行，利用工作窃取和抢占来保持程序响应性。它直接影响延迟、吞吐，以及在调整 GOMAXPROCS 与阻塞调用时的取舍。

items.title_en: Golden Sets: Regression Engineering for Probabilistic Systems
items.title_zh: 黄金集合：概率系统的回归工程
items.summary_en: Advocates golden sets as regression baselines for probabilistic systems, enabling stable validation of stochastic models.
items.summary_zh: 提出黄金集合作为概率系统的回归基线，帮助对随机模型进行稳定的验证。文中讨论如何构建与维护这些基线，以及它们在不确定环境中发现回归问题的作用。

items.title_en: Okmain: How to pick an OK main colour of an image
items.title_zh: Okmain：如何为图片选取主色
items.summary_en: Okmain presents a concise guide on selecting the dominant color of an image, including practical methods and caveats about perceptual color dominance. It’s a handy reference for designers and developers building color-aware UI themes.
items.summary_zh: Okmain 提供从图片中选取主色的实用指南，介绍实用方法与关于感知主色的注意事项。对于设计系统、品牌和主题化 UI 的开发者来说，这是一份有用的参考。

items.title_en: The Cost of Indirection in Rust
items.title_zh: Rust 的间接性成本
items.summary_en: A deep dive into how abstractions and indirection affect Rust performance, balancing ergonomic code against runtime costs. Includes practical tips on choosing data structures and generics.
items.summary_zh: 深入分析抽象和间接性在 Rust 性能中的影响，平衡易用性与运行时成本，并给出在数据结构与泛型选择上的实用建议。

items.title_en: DDR4 Sdram – Initialization, Training and Calibration
items.title_zh: DDR4 SDRAM 初始化、训练与校准
items.summary_en: A technical guide to DDR4 memory initialization sequences, training routines, and calibration procedures essential for reliability and overclocking insights.
items.summary_zh: DDR4 内存的初始化序列、训练过程与校准方法的技术指南，关乎可靠性与超频性能。

items.title_en: Show HN: What was the world listening to? Music charts, 20 countries (1940–2025)
items.title_zh: Show HN：全球音乐榜单（1940–2025）
items.summary_en: An interactive project showing music charts across 20 countries over 1940–2025, offering a historical lens on popular music. It’s a rich dataset for cultural analytics and censuses of taste over decades.
items.summary_zh: 一个展示 20 个国家自 1940 年至 2025 年的音乐榜单的交互式项目，提供对流行音乐历史的洞察。适合音乐爱好者和数据可视化研究者探索跨文化的音乐潮流。

items.title_en: How people woke up before alarm clocks
items.title_zh: 人们在闹钟出现之前如何醒来
items.summary_en: Historical wake-up techniques reveal how people managed mornings before alarm clocks, from natural rhythms to social routines. The piece offers a window into how technology reshapes daily life over time.
items.summary_zh: 这篇文章回顾了闹钟普及前人们如何自行醒来的历史做法，从自然生物钟到社会化的早起习惯。它揭示了人类如何在缺乏现代闹钟的情况下组织日常。

items.title_en: Full Spectrum and Infrared Photography
items.title_zh: 全光谱与红外摄影
items.summary_en: A look at capturing images across the full spectrum, including infrared, and the techniques and gear involved. These modalities reveal details invisible to standard photography.
items.summary_zh: 探讨覆盖全光谱的摄影方法，包括红外线拍摄，以及相关技巧与装备。这些拍摄模式能揭示常规摄影看不到的细节。

items.title_en: Prefix sums at gigabytes per second with ARM NEON
items.title_zh: ARM NEON 实现前缀和，达到数十 GB/s
items.summary_en: A hand-optimized NEON implementation delivers prefix sums at tens of gigabytes per second on a modern ARM core. The result highlights how SIMD and memory layout choices can unlock high-throughput analytics on mobile and edge devices, where bandwidth is precious.
items.summary_zh: 对前缀和算法进行手写优化，利用 NEON 实现达到数十 GB/s 的吞吐。该结果展示了 SIMD 和内存布局优化在移动与边缘计算场景下释放高吞吐能力的潜力。

items.title_en: Worldwide Sidewalk Joy: Adding whimsy to neighborhoods
items.title_zh: 全球人行道快乐：为社区增添趣味
items.summary_en: Worldwide Sidewalk Joy adds whimsy to neighborhoods with artful sidewalk installations, inviting community interaction. The project blends urban design with playful culture to enhance public spaces.
items.summary_zh: 这项全球性计划在街道人行道增设趣味艺术，鼓励社区互动与城市美感。它把小型公共艺术带进日常通行空间，提升邻里体验。

items.title_en: Never snooze a future
items.title_zh: 永不打盹，勿错过未来
items.summary_en: Don't snooze the future—stay proactive about upcoming tech and opportunities.
items.summary_zh: 不要对未来打盹，主动关注即将到来的技术与机会。

items.title_en: Dijkstra's Crisis: The End of Algol and Beginning of Software Engineering (2010) [pdf]
items.title_zh: Dijkstra 的危机：Algol 的终结与软件工程的开端（2010）
items.summary_en: A 2010 PDF discussing Dijkstra's crisis—the end of Algol and the birth of software engineering. It traces how language and discipline shifts reshaped computing practice.
items.summary_zh: 这篇文献梳理了著名的‘Dijkstra 的危机’，即 Algol 语言衰退与软件工程学科兴起的历史转折。

items.title_en: What we learned from a 22-Day storage bug (and how we fixed it)
items.title_zh: 从一场为期 22 天的存储错误中学到的教训，以及如何修复
items.summary_en: An engineering post detailing what was learned from a 22-day storage bug and the incident response that fixed it. It highlights root causes, monitoring gaps, and the fixes that prevented recurrence.
items.summary_zh: 文章回顾了一个持续 22 天的存储漏洞及其根源、诊断与修复过程，总结了避免再次发生的要点。

items.title_en: The Unpredicted vs. the Over-Expected
items.title_zh: 不可预见的 vs 过度预期的
items.summary_en: Argues that surprises often drive progress more than meticulously forecasted outcomes; fosters a mindset that values experimentation and resilience over planning certainty.
items.summary_zh: 认为意外事件往往推动进步，胜过对结果的过度预测；鼓励在计划之外进行试错与韧性建设。

items.title_en: Monster Is the Machine
items.title_zh: Monster Is the Machine
items.summary_en: A critical review examining the idea that machines are increasingly becoming the dominant force shaping modern life. It discusses themes of power, automation, and the human relationship to technology.
items.summary_zh: 该书评/文章探讨机器日益主导现代生活的观点，强调自动化与力量对人类的影响。分析了技术与人类关系的主题以及对未来社会的潜在影响。
